product: LMNT Recharge Electrolyte Drink — Citrus Salt
prompt_modifier: Ultra-clean product photography in the style of LMNT's brand identity: matte black background or minimal white surface, bold condensed all-caps sans-serif typography in white (Bebas Neue style), vivid lemon-yellow (#F5C800) and white color accents, punchy saturated color grading with true blacks and no film grain. Composition is direct and centered. Mood is unapologetic, performance-driven, and science-confident. Props minimal — concrete, slate, or gym surfaces only.

Shot at 50mm f/2.8, shallow depth of field, vibrant and saturated. Top third: large bold white condensed all-caps sans-serif headline reading "AN ELECTROLYTE THAT TASTES LIKE *FRESH-SQUEEZED* LEMON-LIME" with asterisks creating italic emphasis on the key words. LMNT Recharge Citrus Salt stick pack placed bottom-right, angled 15° as if casually laid into the scene. Bottom: semi-transparent black bar spanning full width with three stat columns in white Graphik: "1,000MG SODIUM" | "ZERO SUGAR" | "60MG MAGNESIUM". Very bottom edge: smaller bold white sans-serif "NO ARTIFICIAL FLAVORS. NO SWEETENERS. EVER.". Food is the hero — product is the payoff. 1:1 aspect ratio.

prompts.prompt:
Ultra-clean product photography in the style of LMNT's brand identity: matte black background or minimal white surface, bold condensed all-caps sans-serif typography in white (Bebas Neue style), vivid lemon-yellow (#F5C800) and white color accents, punchy saturated color grading with true blacks and no film grain. Composition is direct and centered. Mood is unapologetic, performance-driven, and science-confident. Props minimal — concrete, slate, or gym surfaces only. Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand typography style and tone. Create: a copy-dominant manifesto ad on clean white background. No background imagery. Top: oversized bold black condensed all-caps sans-serif headline reading "IT'S NOT CHEAP." spanning the top 15%. Below: left-aligned body copy in regular-weight black Graphik, short punchy lines with line breaks:
"$1.50 per packet.
Yes. More than the gas station sports drink.
But that drink has 29 grams of sugar.
And 500mg less sodium than your body actually needs.
We don't use fillers.
No artificial colors.
No 'natural flavors' that aren't.
Just sodium, potassium, magnesium.
In the exact ratios your cells require.
Backed by peer-reviewed research.
Designed by a research biochemist.
Because you can't outperform a bad formula.
Cheap electrolytes are expensive in the long run.
Stay Salty."
Bottom 20%: LMNT Recharge Citrus Salt box centered on white, clean studio shot. No icons, no badges, no CTA. The writing IS the ad. 1:1 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Manifesto format converts price-objection audiences. Works best in retargeting. Short-line formatting is critical — don't let it revert to paragraphs.
